O0600 Physician Examination Day Number CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the physician (or authorized assistant or practitioner) examined the resident in the last 14 days. discontinued 09/30/2023
550 O0700_PHYSN_ORDR_NUM O0700_PHYSN_ORDR_NUM O0700 Physician Order Day Number CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the physician (or authorized assistant or practitioner) changed the resident's orders in the last 14 days. discontinued
